sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: These are letters we write to people in their official positions.

sections.heading: Features
sections.content:
1. Writer’s Address and Date
2. Receiver’s Address
3. Salutation (Dear Sir or Dear Madam)
4. Heading or Title
5. Introduction
6. Body of the letter (at least three paragraphs)
7. Conclusion
8. Complimentary close (Yours faithfully)

sections.heading: Sample Question
sections.content: Write a letter to the Commissioner of Education, informing him about the plan of your council to engage in the expansion of the only secondary school in your town and how the council intends to implement its programme of aid to the school.

sections.heading: Format
sections.content:
Baptist College,
Idi-Ishin,
P.O. Box 30,
Ibadan,
Oyo State,
14th October, 2019

The Commissioner,
Ministry of Education,
Ibadan

Dear Sir,

Expansion Programme for Baptist College

Body of the Letter

Yours faithfully,
(Signature)
Adeyanju Adedayo
